Subject: Michigan Supreme Court rejects case to remove Trump from 2024 ballot

            <tr>

                            The Michigan Supreme Court rejected an effort to boot former President Donald Trump from the state's primary ballot in 2024 under…
                    </a>
                </td>
            </tr>

<td id="Card7816721" class="container GridSmall" width="295" height="240" style="background-color: #FFFFFF; vertical-align: top; ">

    <table width="295" height="100%" align="center" style="height: 100%; background-color: #FFFFFF; " cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0">
        <tbody>
            <tr height="160" style="box-shadow: 0px 5px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); ">
                <td>
                    <a id="Href7816721" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAADFJFCGQ6QWN2X4OQXJPNAVDDDED3XI2I5P4SVMSD66FLZCWHCDT3WTM3IPJUPRZS4SVLF7F6TYWPPDITTY4HF2KETO4IVUIZ553UJWHEX36NJVKGNGCF7SN3DEIZKLA456ZIPU34Q7VIFFO6LYJJK7O4OD27GAV2M5M6NI2FLDSMCL7EHRPF&" target="_blank">

            <tr height="35">
                <td align="left">
                    <table style="margin: 5px 0px 8px 10px;">
                        <tbody>
                            <tr>
                                <td id="ProviderName7816721" height="45" style="font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif;color: #666666; font-size: 15px; text-decoration: none; line-height: 20px; height: 20px; border: none;">

</td>

<td id="Card7816722" class="container GridSmall" width="295" height="240" style="background-color: #FFFFFF; vertical-align: top; ">
